zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Braose於1224年7月15日出生在英國素可布拉波 卡素時，他的父親John de Braose27歲，母親Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire17歲。他於1255年與Aline de Multon在英國素可布拉波結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1291年1月6日在英國英格蘭素可分登享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可布拉波。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Braose于1224年7月15日出生在英国素可布拉波 卡素时，他的父亲John de Braose27岁，母亲Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire17岁。他于1255年与Aline de Multon在英国素可布拉波结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1291年1月6日在英国英格兰素可分登享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可布拉波。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Braose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eckhard, Gerhard, Manfred, Otto.
from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).

variants.name: Ambrose
meanings: English and Scottish: from the personal name Ambrose (French Ambroise, Latin Ambrosius, from Greek ambrosios ‘immortal, divine’), which was popular throughout Christendom in medieval Europe. Its popularity was due in part to the fame of Saint Ambrose (c. 340–397), one of the four Latin Fathers of the Church, the teacher of Saint Augustine. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech, Slovenian, and Croatian Ambrož (see Ambroz ), and also their derivatives, e.g. the Slovenian patronymic Ambrožič.
Irish: from Mac Ambróis ‘son of Ambrose’ (see 1 above); a West Munster name, which has also been Anglicized as McCambridge .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Braose was born on 15 July 1224, in Bramber Castle, Sussex, England, his father, John de Braose, was 27 and his mother, Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire, was 17. He married Aline de Multon in 1255, in Bramber, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 6 January 1291, in Findon, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Bramber, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Braose est né le 15 juillet 1224, à Bramber Castle, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John de Braose, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Aline de Multon en 1255, à Bramber, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 6 janvier 1291, à Findon, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Bramber, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Braose am 15. Juli 1224 in Bramber Castle, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Braose 27 und seine Mutter Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire 17. Er hat 1255 in Bramber, Sussex, England Aline de Multon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 6. Januar 1291 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Findon, Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bramber, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Braose è nato il il 15 luglio 1224 nel Bramber Castle, Sussex, England, il suo padre, John de Braose, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Aline de Multon nel 1255, nel Bramber, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 6 gennaio 1291, nel Findon, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Bramber, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Braoseが1224年7月15日にイギリススセックスブランバー カストルで生まれた時，父John de Braoseは27歳，母Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshireは17歳であった。1255年にイギリススセックスブランバーでAline de Multonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1291年1月6日にイギリスイギリススセックスフィンドンで66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックスブランバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Braose(이)가 1224년 7월 15일 영국 수세스 브램버 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Braose(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1255년 영국 수세스 브램버에서 Aline de Multon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1291년 1월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 핑던에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 브램버에 묻혔다.

pt.15 July 1224–6 January 1291: 15 de julho de 1224–6 de janeiro de 1291
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Braose nasceu em 15 de julho de 1224, em Bramber Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Braose, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Aline de Multon em 1255, em Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 6 de janeiro de 1291, em Findon, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Braose родился 15 июля 1224 г. в местности брэмбир кастл, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Braose было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Aline de Multon в 1255 г. в местности брэмбир, суссекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 6 января 1291 г. в местности финдон, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности брэмбир, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.15 July 1224–6 January 1291: 15 de julio de 1224–6 de enero de 1291
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Braose nació el 15 de julio de 1224, en Bramber Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Braose, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margred verch Llywelyn of Caernarfonshire, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Aline de Multon en 1255, en Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 6 de enero de 1291, en Findon, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Bramber, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
